subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out from Partner Corp. I'm happy to help coordinate an introductory call.

I can propose the following time slots for a meeting:
- April 21, 2026 at 14:00–16:00
- April 22, 2026 at 14:00–16:00  
- April 23, 2026 at 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which works best for your team.

Regarding your request for internal contact details, I'm unable to share internal contact information. For public information about our leadership team, please visit our website at https://company.internal/about.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards
